title: Terabytte's Pack
description: Client-side mods that I use to improve vanilla gameplay in terms of optimization and usability.
body:
A carefully curated collection of client-side mods designed to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience.
This pack focuses on performance optimization, quality-of-life improvements, and better overall usability, while keeping the core vanilla feel intact.

Whether you prefer exploring singleplayer worlds or joining SMP servers, this modpack ensures smoother gameplay, more convenience, and a cleaner interface without changing core mechanics or breaking multiplayer compatibility.

Perfect for players who want a lightweight, polished setup that makes Minecraft run better and feel more enjoyable, all while staying close to the original experience.
